_comment: Legacy example of the metadata that should be exported as outputs.meta from your flake.nix.
_comment2: If you also keep a ft-nixpkgs.json for humans or tooling, keep it in sync with outputs.meta. repo is omitted — derived from the URL.
name: ft-nixbar
_status_values: unstable | beta | stable | experimental | wip | deprecated
_family_note: Set to the family folder name (e.g. ft-nixpalette) if this flake belongs to a family, otherwise null
_homeModules_note: Script handles both homeModules and homeManagerModules output attrs automatically
